generated_by: Claude (Sonnet 5), refined from ChatGPT first drafts - see prompts.md

test_cases.title: Valid login redirects to dashboard/inventory
test_cases.preconditions: User account exists and is active
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the dashboard/inventory page within 2s; session cookie/token is set

test_cases.title: Login with incorrect password is rejected
test_cases.expected_result: Login is rejected; a generic 'invalid credentials' error is shown (no hint as to whether username or password was wrong); user remains on login page

test_cases.title: Login with unregistered username is rejected
steps: Enter a username that has no matching account
test_cases.expected_result: Same generic error as LOGIN-02 - error message must not leak whether the username exists

test_cases.title: Login blocked with blank username and/or password
test_cases.expected_result: Client- or server-side validation blocks submission with a field-level or generic error; no request is sent with empty required fields (or if sent, server returns 4xx)

test_cases.title: Forgot password sends a reset link
test_cases.expected_result: A confirmation message is shown ('check your email...'); a reset email is sent (or reset link is generated) without revealing whether the email is registered
test_cases.note: Not automatable against the current demo target (no forgot-password flow). Written to spec; see prompts.md Login notes.

test_cases.title: Forgot password with unregistered email does not leak account existence
steps: Enter an email with no matching account
test_cases.expected_result: Same generic confirmation message as LOGIN-05 is shown regardless of whether the account exists
test_cases.note: Not automatable against the current demo target.

test_cases.title: Session expires after logout; protected pages are no longer reachable
steps: Log out via the nav menu
Attempt to navigate directly to a protected URL (e.g. /dashboard)
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page; no protected content is rendered even momentarily

test_cases.title: Idle session expires after the configured timeout
steps: Leave the session idle for longer than the configured session-timeout window
Attempt an action that requires an authenticated session
test_cases.expected_result: The stale session is rejected; user is prompted to log in again
test_cases.note: Requires either a configurable short timeout in a test environment or time-travel/mocking of server clock; not automatable against the public demo target as written. Flagged for a config change in TestMu's staging env.

test_cases.title: Account is locked after N consecutive failed login attempts
steps: Attempt to log in with a valid username and an incorrect password N times in a row (N = configured lockout threshold)
Attempt one more login, this time with the correct password
test_cases.expected_result: Account is locked after the Nth failed attempt; the correct-password attempt on the (N+1)th try is still rejected with a lockout-specific message
test_cases.note: Automated against SauceDemo's pre-locked 'locked_out_user' fixture, which validates lockout *enforcement* but not the attempt-counting trigger itself, since the demo app has no live counter to drive. The counting behavior needs testing against TestMu's real endpoint.

test_cases.title: Lockout clears after the configured cooldown period
steps: Wait for the configured cooldown period to elapse
test_cases.expected_result: Login succeeds once the cooldown has elapsed
test_cases.note: Not automatable against the demo target (fixed lockout, no cooldown). Written to spec.
